actual_current_surface_status: bounded-support / C_x|s one-pole finite-residue scout; positive endpoint fits are model-class diagnostics only, not scalar-LSZ pole authority
conditional_surface_status: If a future same-surface theorem supplies one-pole saturation, threshold/contact/FV/IR control, and canonical O_H or W/Z bridge authority, these parameters can seed the strict scalar-LSZ route.
exact_next_action: Use the one-pole mass/residue only as a target for future higher-shell and multivolume diagnostics.  Closure still requires a one-pole/threshold/FV theorem plus canonical O_H/source-overlap, or a genuine W/Z physical-response bridge.

one_pole_fit_from_means.strict_limit: This is the unique one-pole interpolation of two finite endpoint values. It is not physical pole/residue authority without an independent one-pole model-class theorem, threshold/FV/IR control, and a canonical O_H or physical-response bridge.

parent_statuses.campaign_status: open / active campaign continuing after current shortcut blocks
parent_statuses.retained_route: open / retained closure not yet reached
parent_statuses.row_combiner: bounded-support / two-source taste-radial C_sx/C_xx row combiner gate; canonical O_H and pole/FV/IR authority still absent
parent_statuses.schur_complete_monotonicity: bounded support plus exact boundary / C_x|s Schur residual passes the necessary first-shell Stieltjes direction but lacks complete monotonicity, threshold, pole, FV/IR, and source-bridge authority
parent_statuses.schur_pole_lift: exact negative boundary / finite Schur A/B/C rows do not lift to strict pole-row authority without model-class, pole, and FV/IR authority
parent_statuses.schur_repair: bounded-support / Schur-complement Stieltjes repair split: C_s|x fails first-shell monotonicity while C_x|s survives the necessary first-shell check; scalar-LSZ authority absent
parent_statuses.source_higgs_readiness: open / source-Higgs production launch blocked by missing O_H certificate
parent_statuses.strict_scalar_lsz: exact negative boundary / current two-source taste-radial raw C_ss rows do not supply strict scalar-LSZ moment/FV authority

proposal_allowed_reason: Two endpoint values determine a one-pole interpolation, but positive two-pole Stieltjes counterfamilies match the same endpoints. The current surface lacks higher shells, threshold/contact/FV/IR, pole-model-class authority, and canonical O_H or W/Z bridge authority.
strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained y_t closure
does not treat the one-pole interpolation as a physical scalar pole
does not treat C_x|s as canonical O_H
does not supply source-Higgs C_spH/C_HH rows
does not supply W/Z response, strict g2, or covariance rows
does not set kappa_s, c2, or Z_match to one

two_pole_endpoint_counterfamilies.strict_limit: A positive two-pole Stieltjes measure with these masses matches the same two endpoints.  Therefore the one-pole residue is a model assumption, not a consequence of the current row packet.
